debug_info.goal:
S : Finset ℕ
h₀ : S.card = 10
h₁ : S ⊆ Finset.Ico 10 100
⊢ ∃ S₁ S₂, S₁.Nonempty ∧ S₁ ⊆ S ∧ S₂.Nonempty ∧ S₂ ⊆ S ∧ Disjoint S₁ S₂ ∧ ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun A => ∑ x in A, x
  have hf (A : Finset ℕ) (hA : A ⊆ S) : f A ≤ 990 :=
    (Finset.sum_le_sum fun x hx => Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.1 (h₁ (hA hx))).2).trans
      (by rw [Finset.sum_const, Nat.nsmul_eq_mul]; exact Nat.mul_le_mul_right 99 ((Finset.card_le_card hA).trans h₀.le))
  have h_card : (Finset.Icc 0 990).card < S.powerset.card := by
    rw [Finset.card_Icc, Nat.sub_zero, Finset.card_powerset, h₀]; decide
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hABne, hABsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_card f (fun A hA => Finset.mem_Icc.2 ⟨Nat.zero_le _, hf A (Finset.mem_powerset.1 hA)⟩) h_card
  rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  let S₁ := A \ B
  let S₂ := B \ A
  have hsum : ∑ x in S₁, x = ∑ x in S₂, x := by
    apply Nat.add_right_cancel (k := ∑ x in A ∩ B, x)
    rw [Finset.sum_sdiff_add_sum_inter A B, Finset.sum_sdiff_add_sum_inter B A, Finset.inter_comm, hABsum]
  have h_empty {A'} (hA' : A' ⊆ S) : ∑ x in A', x = 0 ↔ A' = ∅ :=
    ⟨fun h => Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.1 fun hne =>
      let ⟨x, hx⟩ := hne; (Finset.mem_Ico.1 (h₁ (hA' hx))).1.ne' (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.1 h x hx),
     fun h => h.symm ▸ Finset.sum_empty⟩
  have hS1ne : S₁.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h; have h1e := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 h
    have h2e : S₂ = ∅ := (h_empty ((Finset.sdiff_subset B A).trans hB)).1 (hsum ▸ h1e.symm ▸ Finset.sum_empty)
    exact hABne (Finset.subset_antisymm (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.1 h1e) (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.1 h2e))
  have hS2ne : S₂.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h; have h2e := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 h
    have h1e : S₁ = ∅ := (h_empty ((Finset.sdiff_subset A B).trans hA)).1 (hsum.trans (h2e.symm ▸ Finset.sum_empty))
    exact hABne (Finset.subset_antisymm (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.1 h1e) (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.1 h2e))
  use S₁, S₂, hS1ne, (Finset.sdiff_subset A B).trans hA, hS2ne, (Finset.sdiff_subset B A).trans hB, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, hsum
